title: ricotia cretica
intro: Ricotia cretica, also known as the Mediterranean Ricotia, is a perennial plant belonging to the Borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Ricotia cretica include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its use as an antiseptic and antifungal agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal use, and is traditionally used in folk medicine in certain regions of the Mediterranean.
